task_completion.description: Navigate to and open the new Task Template creation form in ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus interface with the 'New Task Template' (or similar) form open.

task_completion.description: Set the Task Template name to 'Server Patching Protocol'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Name or Title field in the Task Template form contains exactly 'Server Patching Protocol'.

task_completion.description: Set the priority of the Task Template to High.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Priority dropdown or selection field in the form is set to 'High'.

task_completion.description: Include the 5 required steps in the template description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The description or details text box contains the required phrases: 'Stop all application services', 'Create a VM snapshot', 'Apply critical security updates', 'Reboot the server', and 'Verify service connectivity'.
A success message indicating the template was added/saved, or the 'Server Patching Protocol' template is visible in the list of saved Task Templates.

integrity.description: The agent used the web GUI to create the template.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus web interface, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual ServiceDesk Plus application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Text is entered into the actual ServiceDesk Plus form fields, not a separate text editor or notepad application.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply display the prompt text to bypass the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The required inputs are placed correctly within the application's specific fields (Name, Priority, Description) rather than just echoing the instructions on screen.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Template Name: 'Server Patching Protocol'. Expected Priority: 'High'. Required phrases in description: 'Stop all application services', 'Create a VM snapshot', 'Apply critical security updates', 'Reboot the server', 'Verify service connectivity'.
